---
output: github_document
---

<!-- BENCHMARK-RESULT.md is generated — do not edit by hand.
     Re-render with:
       Rscript -e 'rmarkdown::render("benchmarks/BENCHMARK-RESULT.Rmd")'
     Or run the full pipeline via benchmarks/run.sh
     Methodology, caveats, and reproduction instructions live in README.md. -->

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      results = "asis")
library(arrow)
library(knitr)

# Rmd is in benchmarks/; results/ is a sibling. knitr's default wd
# is the Rmd's directory, so these resolve correctly.
paths <- list(
  timing = function(p) sprintf("results/latest/%s-timing.parquet", p),
  equiv  = "results/latest/equivalence.parquet"
)

read_timing <- function(p) {
  path <- paths$timing(p)
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  as.data.frame(arrow::read_parquet(path))
}

t_hdf5r  <- read_timing("hdf5r")
t_sl     <- read_timing("spacelaser")
t_h5coro <- read_timing("h5coro")

equiv <- if (file.exists(paths$equiv))
  as.data.frame(arrow::read_parquet(paths$equiv)) else
  data.frame()

fmt_s  <- function(x) if (is.na(x)) "—" else sprintf("%.1f s", x)
fmt_b  <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) "—"
  else format(structure(x, class = "object_size"), units = "auto")
}
fmt_int <- function(x) if (is.na(x)) "—" else format(x, big.mark = ",")
```

# Benchmark result

```{r provenance}
frames <- Filter(Negate(is.null), list(t_hdf5r, t_sl, t_h5coro))
if (length(frames) == 0L) {
  cat("*No benchmark data yet. Run `benchmarks/run.sh`.*\n")
} else {
  row <- frames[[1L]][1L, ]
  cat(sprintf(
    "GEDI **%s**, bbox `%s`, %s → %s, %s granules. Run at **%s**.\n",
    row$product, row$bbox, row$date_start, row$date_end,
    fmt_int(row$n_granules), row$timestamp
  ))
}
have_data <- length(frames) > 0L
```

## Headline

```{r headline, eval = have_data}
pipelines <- list(
  list(label = "Spacelaser (Rust, partial HTTP range reads)", t = t_sl),
  list(label = "h5coro (Python, partial HTTP range reads)",    t = t_h5coro),
  list(label = "Status quo (curl + hdf5r, full download)",     t = t_hdf5r)
)
pipelines <- Filter(function(x) !is.null(x$t), pipelines)

tab <- do.call(rbind, lapply(pipelines, function(x) {
  data.frame(
    Pipeline        = x$label,
    `Wall time`     = fmt_s(x$t$seconds_total),
    `Download`      = fmt_s(x$t$seconds_download),
    `Read`          = fmt_s(x$t$seconds_read),
    `Bytes on disk` = fmt_b(x$t$bytes_downloaded),
    Rows            = fmt_int(x$t$n_rows),
    check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
knitr::kable(tab, align = "lrrrrr")
```

```{r speedups, eval = have_data}
lines <- character(0)
if (!is.null(t_hdf5r) && !is.null(t_sl)) {
  lines <- c(lines, sprintf(
    "**Spacelaser: %.1f×** faster than status quo.",
    t_hdf5r$seconds_total / t_sl$seconds_total
  ))
}
if (!is.null(t_hdf5r) && !is.null(t_h5coro)) {
  lines <- c(lines, sprintf(
    "**h5coro: %.1f×** faster than status quo.",
    t_hdf5r$seconds_total / t_h5coro$seconds_total
  ))
}
if (!is.null(t_sl) && !is.null(t_h5coro)) {
  rel <- t_h5coro$seconds_total / t_sl$seconds_total
  lines <- c(lines, sprintf(
    "Spacelaser is **%.2f×** %s h5coro.",
    if (rel >= 1) rel else 1 / rel,
    if (rel >= 1) "faster than" else "slower than"
  ))
}
if (length(lines) > 0L) cat("\n", paste(lines, collapse = "  \n"), "\n", sep = "")

if (!is.null(t_hdf5r) && !is.na(t_hdf5r$seconds_download)) {
  cat(sprintf(
    "\n\nStatus-quo phase split: **%s downloading** vs **%s reading** — the bottleneck is data transfer, not HDF5 parsing.\n",
    fmt_s(t_hdf5r$seconds_download), fmt_s(t_hdf5r$seconds_read)
  ))
}
```

## Equivalence

```{r equiv, eval = have_data}
if (nrow(equiv) > 0L) {
  tab <- data.frame(
    Pair          = sprintf("%s vs %s", equiv$left, equiv$right),
    `Shared cols` = equiv$n_common_cols,
    `All match`   = ifelse(equiv$all_match, "✓", "✗"),
    Notes         = ifelse(nzchar(equiv$divergent_cols), equiv$divergent_cols, ""),
    check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  knitr::kable(tab, align = "lrll")
} else {
  cat("*Need ≥2 pipelines' data to run the cross-pipeline check.*\n")
}
```

spacelaser and hdf5r agree on every shared column. h5coro matches on
row count and coordinates but returns zeros on the science columns
(rh0–100, quality_flag, sensitivity, elev_*); pending investigation,
likely a hyperslice or fill-value handling issue in our h5coro driver
rather than h5coro itself. Timing comparison remains valid.

---

See [`README.md`](README.md) for methodology, workload details, variance
discussion, and reproduction instructions.
